title: The Final Clash Nears — Closing Beat
description: Doflamingo tries to crush the country before Luffy can return to the fight.
scene: On pages 14–16, Luffy, King Riku, Kyros, Dressrosa Citizens, Trafalgar Law move through the final crisis of Dressrosa as the Birdcage and Doflamingo’s rule reach their breaking point.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Plateau on which the Palace is located ...South Face

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Such is the will of the young master!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Whaddaya mean!? Get out of the way!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Eh?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Don't push your luck.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Ryanah!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Don't take another step! This is the...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: New Royal Plateau! For people not of the Donquijote family,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Entrance is for- Biden!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: What the hell do you mean "Family"? Not a single one of your executives is still standing!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: That's the only safe haven right now! Let us up!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Shut it! Everyone here is on death row right now!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: As deemed by the young master, this country...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Is in dire need of a reset...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Buuugh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: What!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Ugyah!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: You're in the way, Friggin' stragglers!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Gunah!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: It's the Warriors from the Colos- Seum!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Haj- rudin!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Barto- Lomeo!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: Don chin- Jao!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Common- Der Kyros is there too!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: Why am I... ABLE move!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Pant

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Me too... the injuries ought to have been too severe!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Don't get too comfort- able just yet!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: This is the way Princess Manshelly has chosen to prolong dressrosa's life!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: Pro- Long?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: Explain yourself, little one!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: At any rate, all of you get moving! Climb up here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: Whoooooo! Thanks for saving us, kyros- SAMA!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: Oi! Save all them cheers for later! Those men among you with even an ounce of strength, follow me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: What!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: oooo 044...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: Oi, where're we going !?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: Dofla- Mingo!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: If you won't come out, then I'll just have to root you out!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: Bird Cage has started contracting faster!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: What!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: Ohhhh... Please, stop this!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: Dofla- Mingo!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: King Riku! Please, save us!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: There's no way we can outrun it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: It's use- less!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #46
dialogue.text: It's time for us to shine, boys!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #47
dialogue.text: come out, come out, wherever you are... Straw Hat...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #48
dialogue.text: Time left till Bird Cage reaches the central district and mass slaughter:

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #49
dialogue.text: Save us!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #50
dialogue.text: 3 minutes !!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: Run for the new Royal Plateau!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #51
dialogue.text: You have gotta be kidding me! Will we even make it!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #52
dialogue.text: Time left till Luffy Recovers Haki:

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #53
dialogue.text: 4 minutes !!

summary: This part focuses on the final clash nears, keeping the final battle centered on Luffy, Law, Doflamingo, and the people trapped inside the Birdcage.
